tentang.title: About Labuha
tentang.description: PT Labuha Inter Nusa is a Excellence, safety, and environmentally driven mining operations. Established on September 16, 2021, PT Labuha Inter Nusa (Labuha) has swiftly grown within the mineral and coal mining sector as a member of the ABM Group. With a dedicated workforce of 611 professionals, our operations span across the vibrant landscapes of Palu, Gorontalo, and other potential areas.

berita.title: News
berita.description: Read the latest news about PT Labuha Inter Nusa

keberlanjutan.title: Sustainability
keberlanjutan.description: At Labuha, our commitment to excellence extends beyond mining operations, encompassing strict Occupational Health and Safety (OHS) standards, environmental conservation, and positive impact on communities.
